Publishes fill.received (every _apply_fill) + order.filled (status transitions to FILLED) via L46. Resolved dual-singleton issue (pytest sys.path injection creates 2 module paths) via lazy _get_l46() probing sys.modules at call time. +3 new tests

Docstring-only: MODE GATING section explaining mode-agnostic composition pattern + Environment Variables (none directly); L42 paper_default FAIL -> PASS

Edge-case hardening: kelly_fraction validates model_p (raises on NaN/Inf/out-of-range), 0 odds, negative bankroll. Backward-compat sentinel preserves existing call sites. +L46 events: kelly.sized (every positive fraction) + risk_limit.breached (any check_risk_limits breach). +6 new tests

Investigation: 'live' tokens were data-classification literals (in-game vs pre-game props), not mode gates. Refactored to _MARKET_TYPE_LIVE named constant; +Paper vs Live Mode docstring stating MODE GATING N/A; +_atomic_write_json for nightly_clv_report; L42 paper/atomic both PASS

Completes pub/sub story — L22 is the first real consumer.
